privileged_info_summary: The currency_setup task configures Magento for multi-currency support by adding EUR (Euro), GBP (British Pound Sterling), and CAD (Canadian Dollar) to allowed currencies while keeping USD as default. Exchange rates are configured from USD with verified values: EUR at 0.9200 (consistent with 2024 average 0.9243), GBP at 0.7900 (consistent with 2024 average 0.7826), and CAD at 1.3600 (consistent with 2024 average 1.3702). All currency codes are valid ISO 4217 codes. The data is synthetic test configuration, not from live exchange rate APIs. All metadata values are internally consistent across task.json, verifier.py, and setup_task.sh.
